log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Naga — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Naga — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 18/67
--- Naga — Iron Concentration --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Naga — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Naga — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: -5/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Naga — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
